purpose: Stop converting missing label availability into repeated negative loops; split the regime problem into parent taxonomy, source-label attachment or crosswalk, and direct manipulation evidence lanes.
triggering_user_correction: Repeated loops produced too many negative results; the main classes should be handled at a higher action-family level, including bull expansion, bear expansion, manipulation, consolidation, and other possible large classes.

preserved_recent_results.decision: Preserve the positive factor-supply index as the Board A supply map and avoid re-proving accepted scoped supply with more negative scans.
Preserve accepted SPY/DIA Bull/Bear/Sideways tracking attachments and do not rerun the broad 168-row crosswalk scan.
Preserve ES=F Bull 15m/1h as scoped source-label crosswalk evidence; do not promote NQ because the Nasdaq 100 versus Nasdaq Composite relation is unresolved.

do_not_repeat: broad 168-row crosswalk rescans after SPY/DIA and ES Bull have been extracted
raw ES/NQ bar scans as if market bars were source labels
OHLCV, HMM, change-point, jump-model, or generated state promotion to parent labels
direct Manipulation acceptance from liquidity, session, sweep, or other OHLCV proxies
primary_decision.do_next: Acquire or document a Nasdaq-100-grade source-label relation for NQ/QQQ before any more NQ/QQQ crosswalk calibration. If no such source relation is obtained, NQ/QQQ stay abstained and the next evidence work moves to crisis support or direct manipulation rows, not another NQ proxy run.

source_backed_parent_map.consumer_action: allow long-risk continuation only when source or crosswalk support and downstream edge gates also pass
suppress long-risk continuation or allow defensive or short-risk logic only after separate edge validation
shift allowed actions away from directional continuation and toward range or abstain logic
suppress or hard-size-down risk unless a crisis-specific downstream strategy is separately accepted
suppress, abstain, cooldown, or quarantine; not automatic entry

source_research_inputs.source: Pagan and Sossounov bull/bear cycle framework
source_research_inputs.use: Supports treating bull and bear as parent cycle families, not flat child signatures.
Open-source reference for source-style regime families including bull, bear, sideways, and crisis.
Useful stress or dislocation and regime-posterior tooling; not an independent label source.
Useful boundary and change-point evidence; not by itself a parent economic label.
Regulatory evidence that spoofing and layering belong in direct manipulation or order-lifecycle lane; public docs are schema, not rows.
Variety map for direct manipulation including pump and dump, bear raid, painting the tape, spoofing, layering, pinging, and quote stuffing.
